node.statement: SETUP I - FINITE DEPTH: For brickwall circuits, the Haar average maps to a 2D Ising model with permutation dofs. RG coarse-graining yields vertical domains with Thouless length L(t) = L_0 e^{t/τ}. Bulk domain walls cost N/L(t)^2, boundary domain walls cost 1/L(t). Corrections scale as Ne^{-2t/τ} crossing to e^{-t/τ} when L(t) >> N. At criticality, corrections scale as Ne^{-t/τ}. [Ground truth: Eqs.(11-14), main.tex lines 212-234]
